findings.note: DO-NOT-EDIT generated parent grouper (Hidden:true, parentNoSubcommandRunE). Subcommands carry the agent-grade Shorts; this grouper is not surfaced as an MCP tool. Generator template should emit a richer Short for the calendar resource family.

DO-NOT-EDIT generated parent grouper (Hidden:true). Wraps calendar free-slot lookup subcommands; not exposed as a callable MCP tool. Generator should emit a sub-resource Short that names the lookup workflow.

DO-NOT-EDIT generated parent grouper for typed-endpoint contact CRUD (Hidden:true). The hand-written 'contact' command (bulk ops, dedup, decay) is the user-facing surface and has agent-grade Short text. Generator template improvement candidate for the typed-endpoint parent.

DO-NOT-EDIT generated parent grouper under contacts (Hidden:true). Wraps contact-note create/list subcommands; not an MCP tool itself. Generator should compose the parent Short from the child operation set.

DO-NOT-EDIT generated parent grouper for contact-tags subcommands (Hidden:true). Distinct from locations.tags. Subcommands handle add/remove on individual contacts. Generator parent template needs scope qualification (per-contact vs. per-location tag operations).

DO-NOT-EDIT generated parent grouper under contacts (Hidden:true). Wraps contact-task CRUD subcommands. Not surfaced as an MCP tool. Generator template should disambiguate task scope (contact-bound vs. standalone tasks).

DO-NOT-EDIT generated parent grouper for contact-workflow enrollment subcommands (Hidden:true). Distinct from the top-level 'workflows' list command. Generator parent template should name the enrollment domain rather than the generic 'workflow' label.

DO-NOT-EDIT generated parent grouper for typed-endpoint conversation operations (Hidden:true). The hand-written 'convo' command provides the agent-facing thread reconstruction. Generator parent template improvement candidate.

DO-NOT-EDIT generated parent grouper for conversation-message subcommands (Hidden:true). Wraps send/inbound/outbound subcommands. Generator should produce a parent Short reflecting the message lifecycle scope.

DO-NOT-EDIT generated parent grouper for location-management subcommands (Hidden:true). GHL locations are multi-tenant sub-accounts; parent Short should name the multi-tenant scope. Not exposed as an MCP tool.

DO-NOT-EDIT generated parent grouper for location custom-field schema CRUD (Hidden:true). The hand-written 'field id' command resolves names to IDs at runtime; this parent wraps schema management. Generator parent template should distinguish schema-management from runtime-lookup.

DO-NOT-EDIT generated parent grouper for location custom-value CRUD (Hidden:true). Custom values are merge-tag substitutions used in workflows and templates; parent Short should name that merge-tag role. Not an MCP tool itself.

DO-NOT-EDIT generated parent grouper for location-level tag management (Hidden:true). Distinct from contacts.tags (per-contact assignment). Generator parent template needs scope qualification to differentiate from the contacts.tags grouper.

DO-NOT-EDIT generated parent grouper for typed-endpoint opportunity CRUD (Hidden:true). The hand-written 'opp' command provides agent-facing reports (stale, funnel). Generator parent template improvement candidate; should reference the pipeline-stage model.

DO-NOT-EDIT generated parent grouper for opportunity-status subcommands (Hidden:true). Wraps status updates within the opportunity pipeline. Generator parent template should name the pipeline-stage transition scope rather than the generic 'status' label.

DO-NOT-EDIT generated parent grouper for user CRUD subcommands (Hidden:true). GHL users are agency team members; parent Short should name agency-team scope rather than generic 'users'. Not an MCP tool itself.
